plan_type_rationale: New HTTP server with 5 endpoints reading .coderef artifacts. Multi-phase with gates between phases: server scaffold → endpoint implementation → integration validation.

phases.title: Server Scaffold + Data Loading
phases.description: Create coderef-intelligence-server.ts with HTTP server boilerplate, .coderef artifact loading (index.json, graph.json, complexity summary), in-memory cache, and /api/health endpoint.

tasks.description: Read src/cli/coderef-rag-server.ts lines 1-160 to internalize the HTTP server pattern used in this codebase
Read .coderef/index.json structure to understand element shape (elementType, layer, capability, complexity, testCoverage)
Read .coderef/graph.json structure to understand edge shape (source, target, type)

Create src/cli/coderef-intelligence-server.ts: HTTP server on port :52850 (CODEREF_INTELLIGENCE_HTTP_PORT), load+cache index.json + graph.json + complexity/summary.json at startup, implement /api/health and /readyz endpoints, CORS headers on all responses
success_criteria: GET /api/health returns 200 JSON with status, version, uptime

phases.title: Intelligence Endpoints Implementation
phases.description: Implement all 5 intelligence endpoints: summary, elements (paginated), edges, hotspots, coverage-gaps.
phases.gate: Phase 1 complete: server starts, /api/health and /readyz return 200

tasks.description: Implement GET /api/intelligence/summary: reads cached index.json, computes layer distribution (count per layer), coverage % (elements with testCoverage=true / total), complexity histogram (buckets: 0-10, 11-20, 21-30, 31+), stale element count (elementType undefined). Returns JSON object.
success_criteria: Returns {layer_distribution: {...}, coverage_pct: N, complexity_histogram: {...}, stale_count: N}
layer_distribution sums to total element count

tasks.description: Implement GET /api/intelligence/elements: paginated list from cached index.json. Query params: ?offset=0&limit=100&layer=&capability=&elementType=. Returns {total, offset, limit, items: [{id, name, file, elementType, layer, capability, complexity, testCoverage}]}.
Implement GET /api/intelligence/edges: return full edge list from cached graph.json. Format: {total: N, edges: [{source, target, type}]}. No pagination (edge count manageable).
success_criteria: Returns array of edges from graph.json
source and target are element IDs or file paths as in graph.json

tasks.description: Implement GET /api/intelligence/hotspots: compute in-degree for each element from graph.json edges, sort descending, return top 20. Format: {items: [{id, name, file, in_degree, layer, complexity}]}.
success_criteria: Returns exactly 20 items (or fewer if <20 elements)
in_degree counts reflect actual edge targets in graph.json

tasks.description: Implement GET /api/intelligence/coverage-gaps: filter elements where testCoverage is false/null, sort by complexity descending, return all. Format: {total: N, items: [{id, name, file, elementType, layer, complexity}]}.
success_criteria: Returns only elements where testCoverage is falsy

tasks.description: Start the server locally and curl each endpoint. Verify all 5 return valid JSON with expected shapes. Check CORS headers present on responses.
success_criteria: All 5 endpoints return 200 with valid JSON
Access-Control-Allow-Origin header present on all responses

phases.title: Documentation + Tests + Commit
phases.description: Write API documentation, add unit tests, run full test suite, commit.
phases.gate: Phase 2 complete: all 5 endpoints return valid JSON

tasks.description: Create docs/intelligence-api.md: document all 5 endpoints with request/response shapes, query parameters, example curl commands, port/env var configuration.
Run full test suite: npx jest. Verify no regressions (baseline: 1524/1554 passing).

Run foundation-docs generators: node scripts/doc-gen/generate-index-md.js && node scripts/doc-gen/generate-exports-md.js && node scripts/doc-gen/generate-hotspots-md.js && node scripts/doc-gen/generate-relationships-md.js

git add src/cli/coderef-intelligence-server.ts package.json docs/intelligence-api.md coderef/foundation-docs/ && git commit -m 'feat(intelligence-api): add read-only data API server (WO-CODEREF-INTELLIGENCE-DATA-API-001)'

acceptance_criteria: GET /api/intelligence/summary returns layer_distribution and coverage_pct correctly
Dashboard can fetch data without CORS issues (Access-Control-Allow-Origin header present)
Server starts on :52850 cleanly alongside existing rag-server on :52849
